rationale: Keep: the cited paper is highly topically aligned (internet display advertising effects across purchase-funnel stages) with the citing paper’s core model of targeted vs. untargeted ads along funnel states. The citing note explicitly says it "extends dynamic targeted-advertising research" with cross-period funnel-state heterogeneity, and the cited note provides a likely foundational stage-based effectiveness benchmark from a randomized field experiment, so this is not an obvious incidental mention.
